welcome.title: What to watch? 🍿
welcome.subtitle: Stop endless scrolling! Tell me what you're in the mood for and get recommendations sorted by rating.
welcome.description: No more spending hours browsing streaming platforms without knowing what to choose. Mention actors, genres, time periods, moods... Our AI suggests the best recommendations, ranked by rating to help you decide quickly.
welcome.placeholder: A movie or TV show with Jennifer Aniston as the lead actress, late 90s, available on Amazon Prime
welcome.magicHappening: Finding the perfect pick for you...

screen1.title: Find exactly what to watch tonight
screen1.subtitle: No more endless scrolling. Discover movies and TV shows tailored to your mood with AI-powered recommendations.

screen2.title: AI analyzes your taste
screen2.subtitle: Describe what you're in the mood for in natural language. Our AI understands genres, actors, time periods, and vibes.

screen3.title: Filter by your platforms
screen3.subtitle: Only see content available on your streaming services. Netflix, Prime, Disney+, HBO, Apple TV+, Hulu, and more.

screen4.title: Your smart watchlist
screen4.subtitle: Save recommendations for later with a single tap. Track streaming availability so you never miss a great pick.
